name: Jack Daniel's Rib Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Brush the ribs with a thin coating of glaze.
3. Place the ribs on the grill.
4. Continue to baste the ribs when turning them.
5. Makes enough for 2 racks of 7 to 10 ribs each.
6. Also great on chicken wings.
